rules.label: Native input element required
rules.description: The component must contain an <input type='checkbox'> element. No custom div-based checkbox is acceptable.
rules.message: Missing required <input type='checkbox'> inside .checkbox. The component must use a native checkbox element.

rules.label: Visual box element required
rules.description: The component must contain a .checkbox__box element.
rules.message: Missing required .checkbox__box inside .checkbox.

rules.label: Checkmark SVG required
rules.description: The component must contain a .checkbox__checkmark element.
rules.message: Missing required .checkbox__checkmark inside .checkbox.

rules.label: Indeterminate mark SVG required
rules.description: The component must contain a .checkbox__indeterminate element.
rules.message: Missing required .checkbox__indeterminate inside .checkbox.

rules.label: Accessible name required
rules.description: The input element must have an accessible name via aria-label, aria-labelledby, or an associated label element.
rules.message: Checkbox input lacks an accessible name. Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or an associated label.

rules.label: Indeterminate ARIA state required
rules.description: When input.indeterminate = true, the element must have aria-checked='mixed'.
rules.message: Indeterminate checkbox must have aria-checked='mixed' set via JavaScript.

rules.label: Read-only must not use disabled attribute
rules.description: Read-only checkboxes must use aria-readonly=true, not the disabled attribute. Disabled removes the element from tab order.
rules.message: .checkbox--readonly must not use the disabled attribute. Use aria-readonly='true' instead.

rules.label: Read-only ARIA attribute required
rules.description: Read-only checkboxes must have aria-readonly='true' on the input.
rules.message: .checkbox--readonly input must have aria-readonly='true'.

rules.label: Disabled must use native disabled attribute
rules.description: Disabled checkboxes must use the native disabled attribute on the input element.
rules.message: .checkbox--disabled input must have the disabled attribute.

rules.label: Focus ring must be visible on :focus-visible
rules.description: The ::after pseudo-element on .checkbox__box must have opacity: 1 when the input is :focus-visible.
rules.message: Focus ring (::after) must be visible (opacity: 1) when input is :focus-visible.

rules.label: No hardcoded hex in component selectors
rules.description: Component CSS selectors must not reference raw hex values. All colors must use CSS custom properties. Exception: the token bridge layer (.checkbox {}) may use #161616 as a literal value for --checkbox-focus-ring-color because --Border-border-black has no primitive alias in token.css. This exception must be documented in analysis.md and removed once --ink-black is added to token.css.
rules.message: Hardcoded hex color found in component CSS selector. Use --checkbox-* token instead. Allowed exception: --checkbox-focus-ring-color: #161616 in the token bridge layer.

rules.label: No primitive token leakage
rules.description: Component CSS must not directly reference --sa-*, --gray-*, or other raw primitive tokens in component selectors.
rules.message: Primitive token reference found in component CSS. Map through --checkbox-* component token.

rules.label: Size modifier required
rules.description: The .checkbox element should have one of: .checkbox--xs, .checkbox--sm, .checkbox--md.
rules.message: No size modifier found. Add .checkbox--xs, .checkbox--sm, or .checkbox--md. Defaults to medium sizing without a modifier.

rules.label: Style modifier required
rules.description: The .checkbox element should have one of: .checkbox--primary, .checkbox--neutral.
rules.message: No style modifier found. Add .checkbox--primary or .checkbox--neutral. Defaults to primary styling without a modifier.

rules.label: Mutually exclusive size modifiers
rules.description: Only one size modifier may be applied at a time.
rules.message: Multiple size modifiers applied to .checkbox. Only one of --xs, --sm, --md is allowed.

rules.label: Mutually exclusive state modifiers
rules.description: A checkbox cannot be both disabled and read-only simultaneously.
rules.message: Both .checkbox--disabled and .checkbox--readonly applied. These modifiers are mutually exclusive.

rules.label: Required --checkbox-* tokens must exist
rules.description: All --checkbox-* tokens must be defined in token.css before the component CSS is consumed.
rules.message: One or more --checkbox-* tokens are not defined in token.css. See analysis.md Missing Tokens section.

rules.label: Ripple hidden when focused
rules.description: The ripple (.checkbox::before) must be suppressed when the input is :focus-visible. Ripple and focus ring are mutually exclusive in the Figma specification. v2: ripple is on .checkbox::before (root), suppressed via :has(.checkbox__input:focus-visible) which requires Chrome 105+, Firefox 121+, Safari 15.4+.
rules.notes: Fallback behavior without :has() support: ripple and focus ring may co-exist on keyboard-focus + hover. Documented as acceptable visual degradation.
rules.message: Ripple (.checkbox::before) should be hidden when input has :focus-visible. Use :has(.checkbox__input:focus-visible) on root.

rules.label: Checkmark must be aria-hidden
rules.description: Decorative SVG icons (.checkbox__checkmark, .checkbox__indeterminate) must not be announced by screen readers.
rules.message: Decorative SVG marks must have aria-hidden='true'.

rules.label: Root element should be label
rules.description: The .checkbox root element should be a <label> to enable native click-to-toggle behavior.
rules.message: .checkbox should be a <label> element for native click-to-toggle behavior.

rules.label: Input must be visually hidden not display:none
rules.description: The .checkbox__input must remain in the accessibility tree and tab order. Use opacity:0 + position:absolute approach, not display:none or visibility:hidden.
rules.message: .checkbox__input must not use display:none. It must remain focusable and in the accessibility tree.

rules.label: Template CSS class coverage
rules.description: All CSS classes used in template.html must exist as selectors in checkbox-2.css.
rules.message: One or more classes used in template.html have no corresponding selector in checkbox-2.css.

rules.label: No orphan selectors
rules.description: All CSS selectors in checkbox-2.css must correspond to elements used in template.html.
rules.message: Orphan CSS selector found in checkbox-2.css with no corresponding element in template.html.

rules.label: Ripple must be on root pseudo-element
rules.description: The Interaction Circle (ripple) must be implemented as .checkbox::before — a pseudo-element on the root component. It must NOT be on .checkbox__box::before. Attaching to the box causes z-index and clipping issues. Interaction Layer rule: attach to root.
rules.message: Ripple must use .checkbox::before (root pseudo-element). Found .checkbox__box::before instead — move to root.

rules.label: Token bridge must not use --Controls-* or --Global-* Figma variable names
rules.description: --Controls-* and --Global-* are Figma variable names only. They do not exist as CSS custom properties in token.css. The component token bridge must map --checkbox-* tokens to actual token.css primitives (--gray-*, --sa-*, --radius-*, etc.).
rules.message: Figma variable name found in CSS (--Controls-* or --Global-*). These do not exist in token.css. Replace with actual --gray-*, --sa-*, or --radius-* primitives.
